scripts.format: oxfmt .dockerignore .github/workflows/build-push-images.yml .gitignore frontend oxlint.config.ts package.json README.md tsconfig.json vite.config.ts ercot-collector ercot-receiver/server.py ercot-receiver/test_server.py ercot-receiver/README.md --write
scripts.format:check: oxfmt .dockerignore .github/workflows/build-push-images.yml .gitignore frontend oxlint.config.ts package.json README.md tsconfig.json vite.config.ts ercot-collector ercot-receiver/server.py ercot-receiver/test_server.py ercot-receiver/README.md --check
scripts.check: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run lint && pnpm run format:check
scripts.validate:commit: pnpm run check && pnpm run test:receiver
